failures.description: The agent misread or misreasoned over the catalog search results and chose item 1507389580 at $1157.86 instead of the actual cheapest item, 5339029584 at $1128.99.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify the cheapest available Smartphone. The ProductCatalogSearch result at index 3 returned two available smartphones sorted by ascending price: item 5339029584 at $1128.99 and item 1507389580 at $1157.86. At index 4, the Executor used the tool output but selected the higher-priced item as the cheapest. This directly contradicts the relevant tool output and was not resolved later, since the Evaluator approved the incorrect answer at index 5.
